overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character walking through a futuristic covered urban plaza with palm trees and neon lighting, then stopping to observe two security guards in tactical gear standing near a wall.

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a futuristic covered urban plaza with a green walkway surface. Palm trees in concrete planters line the left side while orange barriers separate the path from the road on the right. Overhead fluorescent lights illuminate the space as the camera approaches a person in a yellow jacket and begins turning toward two security guards standing near a wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint area near building entrance

events.description: camera comes to a stop near the two security guards, transitioning from walking to stationary observation

agents.ego_description: standing still near the security guards, observing them as they stand with arms crossed

notable_agents.action: security guard with red helmet standing with arms crossed, occasionally shifting weight
security guard with white helmet standing with arms crossed, looking around the plaza

entered.detail: large concrete wall with smooth finish and architectural details
futuristic sedan parked along the wall with reflective windows

segments.scene_description: The camera stops near two security guards in tactical gear who stand with arms crossed near a concrete wall. A futuristic vehicle is parked to the left. The guards appear to be on duty, occasionally shifting their stance while observing the plaza. The background shows glass building facades and digital billboards visible through the open sides of the covered walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective through a futuristic urban plaza that transitions from a steady walk into a focused observation of security personnel. It begins by moving along a green walkway surface, passing palm trees in concrete planters and orange road barriers under the glow of overhead fluorescent lights. As the camera approaches a person in a yellow jacket, the view shifts toward a concrete wall where two security guards in tactical gear are stationed. The movement then comes to a halt, centering on the guards as they stand with arms crossed beside a parked futuristic vehicle. The scene finally opens up to reveal glass building facades and digital billboards visible through the open sides of the covered walkway.
